themes.style_modifiers: Chalk storybook illustration, highly detailed wood-grain textures, soft golden atmospheric dust

bundle.journal_prompt: What small bridge are you threading today? Reflect on Leybridge Threading during Year 1, Canopy lunation, Stash-day.

mood_board.image_prompt: A determined squirrel carefully placing smooth pebbles to form a small bridge across a forest stream, glowing leylines in the water, highly detailed wood grain, soft golden dust, in the SQT Grove Style
mood_board.atmosphere: Steady path of pebbles across a stream, vines linking trees

bundle.story_seed: One pebble at a time, the squirrel began laying a path across the rushing water...
bundle.art_prompt: A determined squirrel carefully placing smooth pebbles to form a small bridge across a forest stream, glowing leylines in the water, highly detailed wood grain, soft golden dust, in the SQT Grove Style
bundle.foraging_idea: Today (Leybridge Threading): Consistent small actions, connections.
